name: select
title: Select
description: Field control for single or multi choice: label, hint, sizes, disabled, and value display.

api.description: Select composes Option List for the open panel. Configure the root, field chrome, trigger, value display, content, and items below.

groups.title: Select
groups.description: Root state for single or multi choice, open state, and disabled.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Single value or multiple values.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value in single mode.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value in single mode.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the single value changes.

props.name: values
props.description: Controlled values in multiple mode.

props.name: defaultValues
props.description: Uncontrolled initial values in multiple mode.

props.name: onValuesChange
props.description: Called when multiple values change.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state for the option list.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the panel opens or closes.

props.name: closeOnSelect
props.description: Close after choosing a row. Defaults to true in single mode, false in multiple.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-interactive field; keeps the menu closed.

groups.title: SelectField
groups.description: Optional outside label and hint. Omit any prop to hide that piece.

props.name: label
props.description: Label above the control. Omit to hide the label row.

props.name: required
props.description: Shows the required mark on the label.

props.name: help
props.description: Help control after the label (for example SelectFieldHelp inside a Tooltip).

props.name: hint
props.description: Supporting text below the control. Omit to hide.

props.name: htmlFor
props.description: Associates the label with the trigger id.

props.name: hintId
props.description: Id for the hint; pair with the describedby ARIA attribute on the trigger.

props.name: className
props.description: Layout width and spacing for the field shell.

groups.title: SelectTrigger
groups.description: Combobox host for the visible control. Sizes, width, radius, and truncation are configured here.

props.name: size
props.description: T-shirt height and type size. "default" is an alias for "md".

props.name: disabled
props.description: Overrides Select disabled when set on the trigger.

props.name: className
props.description: Width and shape. Examples: w-64 (fixed width), w-36 (truncate), rounded-xl or rounded-full (radius override). Default radius uses the kit --radius-4xl token.

props.name: id
props.description: For label association and accessibility.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: Point at SelectField hintId when a hint is shown.

groups.title: SelectValue
groups.description: Shows the placeholder, selected label, or a custom render (summary / badges).

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Pre-select copy when no value is chosen.

props.name: children
props.description: Static content or a render function with selectionMode, value, values, labelFor, and toggleValue.

props.name: className
props.description: Value text styles. Truncation follows a fixed width trigger.

groups.title: SelectValueSummary & SelectValueBadge
groups.description: Multi-select value displays used inside SelectValue.

props.name: SelectValueSummary.count
props.description: Primary count text, for example “2 selected”.

props.name: SelectValueSummary.supportingText
props.description: Muted secondary detail, for example “16 users”.

props.name: SelectValueBadge.value
props.description: Selected option value; remove toggles this value off.

props.name: SelectValueBadge.children
props.description: Badge label. Defaults to the registered option label.

props.name: SelectValueBadge.onRemove
props.description: Optional custom remove handler instead of toggleValue.

groups.title: SelectContent
groups.description: Open Option List panel. Same API as OptionListContent.

props.name: align
props.description: Horizontal anchor relative to the trigger. auto picks the best fit.

props.name: alignItemWithTrigger
props.description: When true, menu width matches the trigger. When false, the menu hugs option content (and stays at least as wide as the trigger).

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred placement side.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap between trigger and panel.

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Shift along the alignment axis.

props.name: portal
props.description: Render in a portal. Set false for inline previews.

props.name: dismissOnScroll
props.description: Close when the page scrolls. Scrolling inside the list stays open. Set false to keep the panel following the trigger (it can cover sticky chrome).

props.name: search
props.description: Show a search field above the options.

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the search field.

props.name: searchValue
props.description: Controlled search query.

props.name: defaultSearchValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial search query.

props.name: onSearchChange
props.description: Called when the search query changes.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Wrap options in the kit ScrollArea (custom scrollbar). Defaults on for plain panels and off when the panel contains a submenu; pass explicitly to override.

props.name: scrollMaxHeight
props.description: Max height of the scrollable body before it scrolls (stacked panels default to 16rem). When the panel opens, the selected option scrolls into view while list order stays the same.

props.name: scrollThumbGap
props.description: Space on each side of the scrollbar thumb, in pixels. Defaults to one spacing unit via --df-option-list-scroll-thumb-gap.

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer actions under the options (for example Reset).

props.name: className
props.description: Panel surface styles.

groups.title: SelectItem
groups.description: Option row. Same API as OptionListItem, including trailing badges and nested chevrons.

props.name: value
props.description: Option value stored in Select state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Not selectable row.

props.name: leading
props.description: Leading control. Use "checkbox" for multi-select rows.

props.name: secondary
props.description: Supporting copy beside or under the label.

props.name: layout
props.description: inline places secondary beside the label; stacked places it underneath.

props.name: trailing
props.description: End of row slot: badge counter, nested menu chevron, or both. When set, the selected check is hidden unless indicator is forced on.

props.name: indicator
props.description: Selected check in single mode. Defaults off when leading is checkbox or trailing is set; otherwise on.

props.name: children
props.description: Primary label registered for SelectValue.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional row styles.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div props. Use the highlighted data attribute for hover or open parent rows in nested menus.

groups.title: Layout & appearance
groups.description: Common configurations that are not single named props. Use className and tokens.

props.name: Radius
props.description: Trigger uses the kit radius token. Override with className such as rounded-xl or rounded-full utilities.

props.name: Corner shape
props.description: Curve style for rounded chrome. Set once with df-ui init --corner-shape (round or smooth), or override --df-corner-shape on :root.

props.name: Fixed width
props.description: Set an explicit width (for example w-64). Multi-select badges wrap to new lines and the trigger grows in height.

props.name: Text truncation
props.description: Constrain width (for example w-36). SelectValue ellipsizes the selected label. The open list still hugs options unless alignItemWithTrigger is true.

props.name: Hug content
props.description: Default menu sizing: width follows the longest option (nowrap rows).

props.name: Match trigger width
props.description: Lock the menu to the trigger width. Useful for fixed width multi-select fields.

props.name: Composition
props.description: Also available: SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator, SelectScrollUpButton, SelectScrollDownButton, SelectFieldLabel, SelectFieldHint, SelectFieldHelp.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-menu-min-width
props.description: Minimum open panel width.

props.name: --df-menu-max-height
props.description: Maximum panel height before scrolling.

props.name: --border
props.description: Trigger and panel border.

props.name: --background
props.description: Trigger and panel fill.

props.name: --muted
props.description: Hover row fill.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
